posts.text: Buenas tardes a todos!  Vamos a empezar las clases de inglés a la iglesia de Cristo este domingo.  Usted puede disfrutar un donut, cafe y clases de inglés (TODO GRATIS) a las 9:00-9:30.  Si tuviera alguna pregunta, me puede llamar o enviar mensaje a 501-339-3339 o puede comentar abajo.  A las 9:30, vamos a continuar con nuestro estudio sobre la fe y la anciedad.  Esperamos verle pronto.  Que Dios le bendiga ricamente!

results.sum: Michael Strickland shares an image post (no text); comments express faith, gratitude for the information, and encouragement — likely a religious or community warning share.

Suli Del Rosal reports that a generator and compressor were stolen from his work truck last night and asks community members to alert him if offered those items — include photos to help police identify them.
Selling a 55-inch TV for $350, includes 15 free days of Netflix.
Edgar Herrera's taco stand is open — tacos are ready and available.
Image-only post by Sarah Meryno; comment indicates she will be delivering food/items in Ruston — orders can be placed now.
Looking for maguey (agave) leaves to buy — needed for making traditional Hidalgo-style pit-roasted lamb barbacoa.
Edgar Herrera's taco stand is open again — come on in, tacos ready.
Selling two cars: a Mustang for $4,500 and a black car for $1,700.
Selling a set of new tires (used only one week) for $375 — originally cost $800; contact via inbox.
Invitation to Sunday Bible study on faith and anxiety at Church of Christ — 9am coffee/donuts, 9:30 study.
Asking for the address of the Catholic church in Monroe or West Monroe; commenters provide two addresses: 1025 Glenwood Dr and 711 N Seventh St, West Monroe.
Edgar Herrera's food stand is open at 3005 Cypress, West Monroe (inside granite shop) — serving tacos, menudo, barbacoa, tortas, and natural drinks (horchata, pineapple, hibiscus).
Edgar Herrera announces tacos, tortas, and barbacoa are ready — come now.
Looking to find/buy a Cocker Spaniel puppy.
Selling assorted homemade desserts in Monroe — call 318-334-3719.
Gabriel Hernandez sends a Christmas greeting to the entire group.
Michael Strickland poses a religious reflection asking what Christ says to us, using the Nahuatl word 'Kinauhua' (meaning 'He calls you').
Edgar Herrera's taco stand is open; commenters ask for location and are told 3005 Cypress, West Monroe inside the granite shop — serving al pastor, steak, chicharron, and chorizo tacos.
Edgar Herrera's taco stand opening at 5:30pm — address confirmed as 3005 Cypress, West Monroe inside the granite shop.
Edgar Herrera's food stand is open — menudo and barbacoa available now, don't miss out.
Edgar Herrera announces tacos are available; commenters ask for location — 3005 Cypress, West Monroe inside granite shop; reviewer says food is absolutely delicious.
Cristy Sherlock selling tres leches and cuatro leches cakes in various flavors starting at $25.
Edgar Herrera's food stand still open this evening with tacos and tortas available.
Gabriel Hernandez wishes the entire group a Happy New Year.
Carlos Vides found an item left behind at Walmart West Monroe and brought it home — owner should call 318-791-0591.
Church of Christ launching free English classes Sunday 9-9:30am (plus donuts and coffee), followed by Bible study on faith and anxiety at 9:30 — contact 501-339-3339.
Edgar Herrera's taco stand is open at 3005 Cypress, West Monroe (inside granite workshop) — tacos and tortas available.
Edgar Herrera's taco stand at 3005 Cypress, West Monroe serving al pastor, chicken fajita, steak, tripe, chorizo, chicharron tacos and milanesa tortas.

Selling a trompo taco cart including salsa cart and canvas roof for $4,000 — contact via inbox.

Selling pupusas at $10 per order with soda included — ready for delivery now, order immediately.
Selling tres leches cakes at $25 each in Monroe — call 318-334-3719; customer orders peach and strawberry flavor.
Continuing free Sunday English classes (3rd of 6 lessons) at Church of Christ 9-9:30am, followed by Bible study on faith and anxiety — contact 501-339-3339.
Selling tres leches cakes at $25 each in Monroe — call 318-334-3719.
